title: On the Divine Names
description: How can we name the unnameable? Dionysius explores every name of God — Good, Light, Beauty, Love, Being — and shows how each fails.
introduction: How can we name the unnameable? Dionysius explores every name of God — Good, Light, Beauty, Love, Being — and shows how each fails.

translation.text: We call it the Good because it gives being to all things and holds all things in existence. We call it Beautiful because it is the cause of all harmony and splendor.
